task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoServer Style page shows 'city_labels_priority' in the style name field or in the list of styles.

task_completion.description: Configure a red circle point symbolizer of size 6
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor, the XML contains a PointSymbolizer with <WellKnownName>circle</WellKnownName>, a red fill color (e.g., #FF0000 or red), and <Size>6</Size>.

task_completion.description: Configure text symbolizer for the 'name' attribute with Arial Bold, 12px, Black font
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor, the XML contains a TextSymbolizer with <PropertyName>name</PropertyName>, and CssParameters for font-family 'Arial', font-weight 'bold', font-size '12', and a black fill (e.g., #000000 or black).

task_completion.description: Configure text placement with Anchor X=0.5, Y=0.0, and 5px vertical displacement
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor, the TextSymbolizer contains a PointPlacement with <AnchorPointX>0.5</AnchorPointX>, <AnchorPointY>0.0</AnchorPointY>, and <DisplacementY>5</DisplacementY>.

task_completion.description: Configure label priority using 'pop_max' and spaceAround VendorOption set to 15
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor, the TextSymbolizer contains <Priority><PropertyName>pop_max</PropertyName></Priority> (or similar priority expression) and <VendorOption name="spaceAround">15</VendorOption>.

task_completion.description: Assign 'city_labels_priority' as the default style for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Layer Publishing tab for 'ne_populated_places', the Default Style dropdown is set to 'city_labels_priority'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GeoServer web interface to create the style and assign it
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GeoServer web administration interface in a browser, not just terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the SLD in a local text editor without uploading it to GeoServer
integrity.visual_evidence: The SLD code is visible inside the GeoServer style editor text area, not just in a standalone text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: The agent saved the layer configuration with the new style
integrity.visual_evidence: The layer configuration page shows the style selected, and there is evidence of saving (e.g., clicking the Save button, returning to the layers list, or a success message).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The style name must be 'city_labels_priority'. The layer name is 'ne:ne_populated_places'. The priority attribute must be 'pop_max'. The spaceAround VendorOption must be 15. The font must be Arial, bold, size 12. All these parameters should be visible in the SLD XML configuration within the GeoServer interface.
